channel.title: QA Pulse
channel.description: Weekly software testing and QA industry news for testers who want to stay on the cutting edge.
channel.itunes:author: QA Pulse
channel.itunes:subtitle: Weekly software testing and QA industry news for testers who want to stay on the cutting edge.
channel.itunes:summary: Weekly software testing and QA industry news for testers who want to stay on the cutting edge.

item.title: QA Pulse - 2026-03-30
item.description: Welcome to QA Pulse, I'm your host Alex, and I'm excited to have you all back for another episode. We've got a fantastic lineup of stories for you today, so let's dive right in. As we've been seeing for a while now, artificial intelligence is revolutionizing the future of QA testing, and this year is no exception. In fact, top AI agents are being hailed as game-changers for the industry, and it's easy to see why. With the ability to automate testing, reduce manual labor, and increase efficiency,...
item.itunes:title: QA Pulse - 2026-03-30
item.itunes:author: QA Pulse
item.itunes:summary: Welcome to QA Pulse, I'm your host Alex, and I'm excited to have you all back for another episode. We've got a fantastic lineup of stories for you today, so let's dive right in. As we've been seeing for a while now, artificial intelligence is revolutionizing the future of QA testing, and this year is no exception. In fact, top AI agents are being hailed as game-changers for the industry, and it's easy to see why. With the ability to automate testing, reduce manual labor, and increase efficiency,...
